calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Joseph H. Schieffer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff CA-Gateway Office Limited Partnership.
Carol Edmister, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Entegrity Solutions Corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on November 3, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 28, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff CA-Gateway Office Limited Partnership, and against the Defaulted Defendant Entegrity Solutions Corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,112,589.50.
Interest - $64,621.84.
Attorney Fees - $60,379.47.
Costs - $430.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,238,021.31.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Continued To Mar-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
